forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,58 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: e280
+project: spatial-nav
+title: Grid ↔ perspective tab bar spatial nav (up/down across the boundary)
+---
+## What
+
+The perspective tab bar sits above the grid. Today, from a cell in the top row of the grid, pressing `k` cannot reach the perspective tabs — the user is trapped in the grid. The stated purpose of universal spatial nav was "keyboard to anywhere on screen and not get trapped."
+
+Root cause: `ScopedPerspectiveTab` in `kanban-app/ui/src/components/perspective-tab-bar.tsx` uses `CommandScopeProvider` — it registers a scope (so right-click commands resolve) but never registers a spatial rect with Rust. Beam test has no perspective tab candidates.
+
+### TDD — failing tests
+
+```ts
+describe("grid to perspective bar nav", () => {
+  it("k from top-row cell moves focus to the active perspective tab", async () => {
+    // Open a view with a non-Default perspective active.
+    // Click cell (row 0, col 0). Press k.
+    // Focus lands on the active perspective tab (assert data-moniker attribute).
+  });
+
+  it("j from the active perspective tab moves focus back into the top row", async () => {
+    // Click the active perspective tab. Press j.
+    // Focus lands on the top-left data cell (after the row selector).
+  });
+
+  it("h/l between perspective tabs in the same bar", async () => {
+    // Click the right-most perspective tab. Press h.
+    // Focus lands on the tab to its left.
+  });
+});
+```
+
+All must fail against HEAD. Only then implement the fix.
+
+### Likely fix
+
+Change `ScopedPerspectiveTab` to wrap in `FocusScope` (renderContainer=false, showFocusBar=false) with `moniker("perspective", perspective.id)`. The inner `PerspectiveTab`'s root `<div className="inline-flex items-center">` attaches the FocusScope's elementRef via the `FocusScopeElementRefContext` hook — same pattern as grid cells / table rows.
+
+Do NOT attempt this fix without the failing tests. The session's live edit introduced this exact change without a test and broke board nav; we have no idea whether it's actually minimal or correct.
+
+### Subtasks
+
+- [ ] Write failing E2E: `k` from top cell → active perspective tab
+- [ ] Write failing E2E: `j` from active perspective tab → top cell
+- [ ] Write failing E2E: `h/l` between perspective tabs
+- [ ] Implement fix only until each test passes
+- [ ] Verify no regression in perspective-tab-bar.test.tsx unit tests
+- [ ] Verify no regression in grid cell nav (sibling task's tests)
+
+### Acceptance
+
+- [ ] All three failing tests pass
+- [ ] Existing perspective rename / context-menu behaviors unchanged
+- [ ] Grid and inspector nav still work
\ No newline at end of file
